title: Have a warning when subitems have not been acted on and an item is being closed
excerpt: It would be helpful if there could be a warning or indication if subitems have not be acted on and the item is going to be closed, this would help prevent people from forgetting to check subitems.

posts.author: emdriskill (Emma Driskill)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be helpful if there could be a warning or indication if subitems have not be acted on and the item is going to be closed, this would help prevent people from forgetting to check subitems.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Emma,

Could our automations help with this? For example, setting up a date column to track whether changes have been made in specific columns?

Screen Shot 2023-08-10 at 2.35.53 pm1168×562 26.1 KB

Let me know what you think

posts.author: MortenN (Morten Nielsen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Bianca’s solution works really well! You can add notifications so that the person responsible for the item are made aware.

If you want a visual way of seeing the subitems have not been completed on an item, you can also add the Summary of the subitems’ status on the parent item.

Screenshot 2023-08-10 at 14.08.17846×605 34.8 KB
